sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ يَاسِرٌ مِنْ مُدِيرِهِ إِجَازَةً لِيَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Jasir je od svog direktora tražio slobodan dan.
sentences.translationEn: Yassir asked his manager for a day off.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّهُ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَرَى طَبِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da želi ići kod ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: He said he wants to see a doctor.

sentences.arabic: وَافَقَ الْمُدِيرُ وَقَالَ لَهُ أَنْ يَعْتَنِيَ بِصِحَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je pristao i rekao mu da vodi brigu o zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: The manager agreed and told him to take care of his health.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ يَاسِرٌ مُدِيرَهُ وَذَهَبَ إِلَى الطَّبِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Jasir je zahvalio direktoru i otišao kod ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: Yassir thanked his manager and went to the doctor.
